objective: Understand functional dependencies, database anomalies, and normalization up to Third Normal Form (3NF).
learningObjectives: Identify functional dependencies in relational schemas
Recognize redundancy and anomalies in unnormalized tables
Apply normalization rules to decompose relations into 1NF, 2NF, and 3NF
Determine candidate keys, primary keys, and superkeys
Understand trade-offs between normalization and performance
expectedOutcomes: Analyze a relation to find its functional dependencies
Detect insertion, update, and deletion anomalies
Normalize relations to appropriate normal forms
Design well-structured schemas that minimize redundancy while preserving dependencies
